overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player driving a futuristic vehicle through a neon-lit cyberpunk city. The journey transitions from covered urban streets through an underpass onto elevated highways with complex overpass systems, ending in a dense commercial district with large digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban commercial street with neon storefronts

events.description: vehicle approaches and enters underpass beneath the large softsys building

agents.ego_description: driving through urban canyon street approaching an underpass intersection

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: large commercial building with prominent green neon 'softsys' signage on facade
futuristic vehicle interior with glowing green and red instrument panels
small white cat-like figurine sitting on the dashboard
commercial shops with bright neon signs and awnings lining the street
wall covered in colorful street art and graffiti tags

segments.scene_description: Driving through a covered urban street lined with cyberpunk storefronts and neon signs. The vehicle approaches a large building with green 'softsys' signage while following a white sedan. The dashboard features a distinctive figurine and glowing futuristic instruments.

events.description: entering underpass causes immediate shift from natural daylight to artificial tunnel lighting
exiting underpass into bright sunlight creates lens flare effect

agents.ego_description: transiting through the short underpass tunnel and emerging onto the elevated highway system

entered.detail: concrete ceiling with fluorescent strip lighting of the underpass
rough concrete walls with graffiti and utility fixtures
bright daylight visible at the tunnel exit ahead

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a concrete underpass beneath the city buildings, transitioning from natural to artificial lighting. The tunnel walls are lined with graffiti and utilities. Bright daylight is visible at the exit ahead as the vehicle prepares to emerge onto the highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated multi-level highway interchange with concrete infrastructure

events.description: vehicle navigates a gentle right curve on the highway ramp
passing beneath large concrete overpass temporarily blocks the sky view

agents.ego_description: navigating the elevated highway system with multiple levels of concrete overpasses and ramps

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving ahead on the highway

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass structure with multiple levels
concrete and metal safety barriers lining the elevated roadway
complex interchange with roads crossing at different elevations
directional signs and route markers for the highway system
support columns for the elevated highway structures

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass onto an elevated highway system with complex concrete overpasses and interchanges. The vehicle navigates curves while passing under massive concrete structures. Sparse palm trees and distant buildings are visible beyond the highway barriers.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial highway lined with massive digital billboards and neon advertisements

events.description: highway transitions from industrial concrete overpass area to dense commercial district with digital advertising
passing a black sedan while maintaining speed on the multi-lane highway

agents.ego_description: cruising through the commercial highway district surrounded by towering digital billboards and neon signs

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving parallel in the right lane
white truck visible ahead in the distance

entered.detail: massive curved digital screen displaying animated advertisements
large advertisement featuring anime-style character art
commercial building facade covered in red neon lighting and signage
tall skyscrapers with glass facades and rooftop advertisements

segments.scene_description: The highway opens into a dense commercial district dominated by massive digital billboards and neon-lit skyscrapers. The vehicle passes other traffic while driving past curved advertising screens and anime-style billboards. The environment shifts from concrete infrastructure to glass and steel commercial towers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a futuristic city that transforms from narrow, neon-lit streets into a sprawling commercial district of glass and steel. It begins by following a white sedan past cyberpunk storefronts and green softsys signage, with the vehicle's glowing dashboard and a small figurine visible in the foreground. As the car enters a concrete underpass, the environment shifts from urban street lighting to a graffiti-lined tunnel before emerging into bright daylight. The scene then expands onto an elevated highway system, navigating complex concrete overpasses and interchanges flanked by sparse palm trees. Finally, the concrete infrastructure gives way to a dense commercial hub dominated by massive curved advertising screens and anime-style digital billboards towering over the traffic.
